name: Valtiria | An encounter with the enemy
description:
"Trapped behind enemy lines with an enemy soldier... What could possibly go wrong?"

Humanity was rescued from extinction centuries ago by the Zargon Empire, adopted as a warrior caste, humanity now forms the Imperial military's spine. Now the Empire is at war with the Galactic Republic, the planet Golgotha IV being the main stage of the war.

(I'm just starting out with this bot thing, and I'm not an English speaker and I use Google translate to code, so bear with me. If there's any bug with the bot, let me know in the comments.)

[The image does not belong to me, the artist is thelivingtrashcan on e621, full image below.]


• Hi everyone, I'm just starting to make bots, so the bot may have bugs or not work well. Also, I just wanted a way to express the sci-fi world I'm building, so if all goes well with this bot there will soon be more set in the same universe, I've been thinking of a theme similar to World War II movies, so despite the sci-fi elements, think of that theme... And yes, the humans here are space orcs, and yes, they are fighting for the side that could be considered space Nazis. Why? Why not? Have fun.
creator: Amadeus0610
